name: ntulearn-mcp
description: MCP server for NTULearn (NTU Singapore's Blackboard Learn). Announcements, assignments, grades, and course files — across all your enrolled courses.
long_description:
Lets Claude answer questions like "what's due next week?", "what announcements went out this week?", and "organise my semester files into ~/NTU/y3s1/…" — fanning out across all your enrolled courses automatically.

Authenticates via the BbRouter cookie — auto-read from your browser on macOS / Linux / Windows-with-Firefox. Windows + Chrome/Edge users paste the cookie into the field below (Claude Desktop stores it in your OS keychain).

Tools: list_courses, get_course_contents (with folder drill-down), get_upcoming (calendar + assignment due dates), get_announcements (cross-course, with since filter), get_gradebook (cross-course), search_course_content, download_file (with destination_dir for folder hierarchies), read_file_content (text extraction from PDFs / Office files; vision opt-in for diagrams).

bbrouter_cookie.title: BbRouter cookie (optional)
bbrouter_cookie.description: Leave empty to auto-read from your browser. Required on Windows + Chrome/Edge (browser auto-read is blocked there). To get the value: log into ntulearn.ntu.edu.sg, open DevTools → Application → Cookies → ntulearn.ntu.edu.sg, copy the BbRouter cookie value.

tools.name: ntulearn_list_courses
tools.description: List the user's enrolled NTULearn courses.

tools.name: ntulearn_get_course_contents
tools.description: Get the content tree of a course. Omit parent_id for the root; pass it to drill into a folder.

tools.name: ntulearn_get_upcoming
tools.description: Calendar items across enrolled courses for the next 2 weeks. type='GradebookColumn' filters to assignment due dates.

tools.name: ntulearn_get_announcements
tools.description: Announcements across all enrolled courses, newest first. Optional since (ISO-8601) for a time window.

tools.name: ntulearn_get_gradebook
tools.description: Gradebook columns and scores across all enrolled courses.

tools.name: ntulearn_search_course_content
tools.description: Recursive substring search within one course's content tree.

tools.name: ntulearn_download_file
tools.description: Download a content item's files to disk. destination_dir accepts absolute paths and ~/… prefixes.

tools.name: ntulearn_read_file_content
tools.description: Read an attached file inline — text mode by default (PDF/docx/pptx/xlsx); pass mode='vision' for diagram pages.
